_meta.author: isaiahbjork
_meta.title: Gradient AI Chat Input
_meta.description: Ideal for modern AI-powered applications and chat interfaces where users need a premium, visually appealing input experience. Its sophisticated gradient design with multi-layer borders and smooth animations creates an engaging interface perfect for AI assistants, messaging platforms, or any application requiring file attachments and model selection. The component's responsive design and accessibility features make it suitable for professional dashboards, educational tools, or creative applications where user experience matters.
